data.title: Global Darknet Bust Leads to $200M in Digital Asset and Cash Seizures
data.description:
A global sting, dubbed Operation RapTor, has led to the arrest of 270 suspects and the seizure of $200 million in cash and crypto.
source: https://decrypt.co/321750/global-darknet-bust-200m-digital-asset-cash-seizures

data.title: The giant whale tripled its long position in HYPE and made a floating profit of more than 13.41 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @OnchainLens monitoring, as HYPE hits a record high, the HYPE triple leverage long position held by a giant whale address (0xe4178ba889ac1c931861533b98bb86cb9d4858c7) currently has a floating profit of more than 13.41 million US dollars.
The entry price of this address is $12.93, and the current liquidation price is $4.21.

data.title: Significant Increase in Smart Contract Deployments on Aptos Chain
data.description: According to PANews, data from Nansen indicates a notable rise in the daily deployment of smart contracts on the Aptos blockchain. Since the end of April, the number of deployments has surged from under 100 to over 400 by early May.

data.title: AVA AI Back From Death: Best Crypto To Buy Now
data.description:
FIFA has made a quiet but pretty significant change to its Web3 game plan. The global football body is dropping Algorand and moving its digital collectibles project, FIFA Collect, over to Avalanche. The move isn’t just a technical shuffle, it reflects FIFA’s changing view of what fans actually want from NFTs and how it plans.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/presales/ava-ai-back-from-death-best-crypto-to-buy-now/

data.title: Worldcoin Price Action Heats Up as MACD Turns Bullish
data.description:
The Worldcoin price tests key resistance near $1. 54 after a strong rally, with indicators signaling bullish momentum.

The post Worldcoin Price Action Heats Up as MACD Turns Bullish first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/05/23/worldcoin-price-action-heats-up/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=worldcoin-price-action-heats-up

data.title: JuCoin will launch USD1/USDT trading pair at 13:00 (UTC) on May 23, 2025
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, JuCoin will launch USD1 at 13:00 (UTC) on May 23, 2025, and open USD1/USDT trading pairs.
USD1 is a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar launched by World Liberty Financial (WLFI) in April 2025, aiming to build a bridge between traditional finance and decentralized finance (DeFi).

data.title: Senator Lummis Highlights Importance of U.S. Leadership in Digital Assets
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis, chair of the Senate Banking Subcommittee on Digital Assets, recently emphasized the significance of digital assets for the future. She stated that it is the responsibility of the United States to ensure continued leadership in this sector.

data.description:

The analyst, pseudonymously known as Credible Crypto, tells his 467,200 followers on the social media platform X that Bitcoin is now in the final phase of a bullish cycle.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/23/things-are-about-to-get-silly-analyst-says-bitcoin-on-cusp-of-most-aggressive-expansion-since-inception/

data.title: Bitcoin's Surge Shifts Market Focus to XRP and SOL
data.description:
According to PANews, Bitcoin's recent rise above $110,000 has led to a market shift towards major altcoins like XRP and SOL. Bitget's Chief Analyst, Ryan Lee, noted that XRP is benefiting from regulatory clarity and a technical breakout, potentially increasing its mid-term price to between $3 and $8. The XRP/BTC weekly chart has shown a bullish 'golden cross' signal. Meanwhile, SOL might reach $220 to $300, driven by ETF expectations
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/24622809321754?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Bitcoin's Surge Shifts Market Focus to XRP and SOL
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin's recent rise above $110,000 has led to a market shift towards major altcoins like XRP and SOL. Bitget's Chief Analyst, Ryan Lee, noted that XRP is benefiting from regulatory clarity and a technical breakout, potentially increasing its mid-term price to between $3 and $8. The XRP/BTC weekly chart has shown a bullish 'golden cross' signal. Meanwhile, SOL might reach $220 to $300, driven by ETF expectations. Despite ongoing macroeconomic uncertainties, QCP Capital believes the current rally has a more solid foundation, with market sentiment not yet overheated.

data.title: U.S. Pressures EU for Unilateral Tariff Reductions Amid Trade Talks
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump's trade representatives are urging the European Union to unilaterally reduce tariffs on American goods. Sources indicate that without concessions, the EU may face additional tariffs and struggle to make progress in negotiations. U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer is expected to inform EU Trade Commissioner Maroš Šefčovič that the EU's recent 'explanatory note' for negotiations falls short of U.S. expectations. The U.S. is dissatisfied with the EU's proposal for mutual tariff reductions, preferring a unilateral commitment similar to other trade partners. Additionally, the EU has not included its proposed digital tax in the negotiation agenda as requested by the U.S. Insiders reveal that while the EU seeks a mutually recognized framework for talks, significant differences remain between the two parties.
